sql: SELECT e1.hire_date, e1.first_name FROM employees AS e1
SELECT a1.customer_id, a1.opened_on FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.interest_rate < 282 LIMIT 84
SELECT c1.credit_score, c1.date_of_birth FROM customers AS c1 ORDER BY c1.credit_score
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1
SELECT c1.created_at, c1.email FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.email LIKE 'user%@%'
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 ORDER BY b1.is_active
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 ORDER BY t1.amount LIMIT 63
SELECT l1.customer_id, l1.is_active FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.principal_amount <> 835 LIMIT 62
SELECT c1.address, c1.last_name FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.first_name <> 'test' ORDER BY c1.email
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 ORDER BY c1.first_name
SELECT e1.is_active, e1.branch_id, e1.salary FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.is_active = 0
SELECT c1.credit_limit, c1.card_type, c1.id FROM cards AS c1
SELECT b1.city, b1.employee_count FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.employee_count = 558
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.last_name LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY e1.branch_id
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.is_active = 0
SELECT c1.is_active, c1.issued_on, c1.credit_limit FROM cards AS c1
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.expiry_date < DATETIME('now', '-7 days') ORDER BY c1.issued_on LIMIT 19
SELECT l1.term_months, l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.term_months > 405
SELECT a1.currency, a1.is_active, a1.id, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.is_active = 1 LIMIT 60
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a4 ON c1.account_id = a4.id WHERE a4.currency = '123'
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 RIGHT JOIN accounts AS a4 ON c1.account_id = a4.id WHERE a4.interest_rate > 977
SELECT l1.start_date, l1.is_active, c8.id FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c8 ON l1.customer_id = c8.id WHERE c8.id >= 326
SELECT t1.description, a7.opened_on, a7.account_type, a7.interest_rate FROM transactions AS t1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a7 ON t1.to_account_id = a7.id
SELECT b1.name, b1.manager_id, b1.is_active, e7.id FROM branches AS b1 FULL JOIN employees AS e7 ON b1.id = e7.branch_id
SELECT b5.state, e1.id, b5.is_active, b5.manager_id FROM employees AS e1 RIGHT JOIN branches AS b5 ON e1.branch_id = b5.id WHERE b5.employee_count <= 76
SELECT c3.id, c3.email, c3.address, c3.last_name FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c3 ON l1.customer_id = c3.id WHERE c3.address = '123'
SELECT b5.city, b5.employee_count, e1.branch_id, b5.name FROM employees AS e1 INNER JOIN branches AS b5 ON e1.branch_id = b5.id
SELECT a1.id, t5.transaction_type, t5.transaction_date FROM accounts AS a1 FULL JOIN transactions AS t5 ON a1.id = t5.to_account_id
SELECT c8.email, c8.date_of_birth, c8.last_name, c8.first_name FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c8 ON l1.customer_id = c8.id
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c4 ON l1.customer_id = c4.id WHERE c4.first_name LIKE '%c'
SELECT e9.first_name, e9.id, e9.position, b1.manager_id FROM branches AS b1 FULL JOIN employees AS e9 ON b1.id = e9.branch_id WHERE e9.is_active = 1
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a2 ON c1.account_id = a2.id WHERE a2.opened_on > DATETIME('now', '-26 days')
SELECT b1.is_active, b1.id, e9.position, b1.name FROM branches AS b1 LEFT JOIN employees AS e9 ON b1.id = e9.branch_id WHERE e9.first_name = 'user'
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 RIGHT JOIN employees AS e9 ON b1.id = e9.branch_id
SELECT c2.is_active, c2.address, l1.principal_amount, l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c2 ON l1.customer_id = c2.id
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 RIGHT JOIN customers AS c1 ON l1.customer_id = c1.id WHERE c1.address <> 'activity'
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 RIGHT JOIN branches AS b7 ON e1.branch_id = b7.id
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 INNER JOIN branches AS b6 ON e1.branch_id = b6.id WHERE b6.id = 61
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 FULL JOIN branches AS b6 ON e1.branch_id = b6.id
SELECT e1.is_active FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id IN (SELECT sub_b.id FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.is_active = 0)
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.salary, e1.is_active FROM employees AS e1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.id = e1.branch_id AND sub_b.name LIKE 'b%')
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.id IN (SELECT sub_e.branch_id FROM employees AS sub_e WHERE sub_e.last_name = 'activity')
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.id = l1.customer_id AND sub_c.email = 'user30@example.com')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM cards AS inner_cards WHERE inner_cards.is_active = 1) AS derived_table
SELECT c1.first_name, c1.last_name, c1.email FROM customers AS c1 JOIN customers AS c2 ON c1.id = c2.id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT c1.first_name, c1.last_name, c1.email FROM customers AS c1 JOIN customers AS c2 ON c1.id = c2.id AND c1.id <> c2.id LIMIT 11
SELECT b1.id, b1.name, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 JOIN branches AS b2 ON b1.name = b2.name AND b1.id <> b2.id
SELECT e1.is_active, e1.position, e1.branch_id, e1.hire_date FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id IN (SELECT sub_b.id FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.state LIKE 'b%')
SELECT c1.issued_on FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.currency <> '123')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.id = 923) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.state LIKE '%c'
SELECT c1.first_name, c1.last_name, c1.address FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.customer_id FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.interest_rate = 626)
SELECT b1.id, b1.state, b1.manager_id, b1.is_active FROM branches AS b1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employees AS sub_e WHERE sub_e.branch_id = b1.id AND sub_e.first_name LIKE '%c')
SELECT l1.principal_amount, l1.is_active, l1.status, l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.customer_id IN (SELECT sub_c.id FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.is_active = 1)
SELECT a1.id, a1.customer_id, a1.account_type FROM accounts AS a1 JOIN accounts AS a2 ON a1.customer_id = a2.customer_id AND a1.id <> a2.id
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.customer_id FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.monthly_payment > 131)
SELECT c1.address, c1.date_of_birth, c1.id FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.customer_id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id <> 914)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.is_active = 0) AS derived_table
SELECT e1.last_name, e1.hire_date, e1.id, e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id IN (SELECT sub_b.id FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.manager_id = 367)
SELECT t1.to_account_id, t1.transaction_date, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.interest_rate <= 297)

SELECT c1.credit_limit, c1.account_id, c1.id, c1.expiry_date FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.id > 838 UNION SELECT c2.credit_limit, c2.account_id, c2.id, c2.expiry_date FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.id < 942 ORDER BY credit_limit LIMIT 38

SELECT a1.customer_id, a1.interest_rate, a1.opened_on, a1.balance FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.currency = 'user' UNION SELECT a2.customer_id, a2.interest_rate, a2.opened_on, a2.balance FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.is_active = 1

SELECT c1.id, c1.is_active, c1.address FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.address LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT c2.id, c2.is_active, c2.address FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.date_of_birth < DATETIME('now', '-29 days')

SELECT b1.employee_count, b1.manager_id, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.state <> '123' UNION SELECT b2.employee_count, b2.manager_id, b2.city FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.is_active = 1 ORDER BY employee_count

SELECT a1.interest_rate, a1.opened_on FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.opened_on < DATETIME('now', '-17 days') UNION ALL SELECT a2.interest_rate, a2.opened_on FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.id = 402 LIMIT 29
SELECT b1.id, b1.manager_id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.id = 508 UNION ALL SELECT b2.id, b2.manager_id FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.employee_count > 687 LIMIT 11

SELECT c1.credit_score, c1.date_of_birth, c1.last_name, c1.id FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.address LIKE '%a%' UNION SELECT c2.credit_score, c2.date_of_birth, c2.last_name, c2.id FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.credit_score = 791
SELECT c1.date_of_birth, c1.is_active FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.last_name LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT c2.date_of_birth, c2.is_active FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.address = 'activity'

SELECT a1.is_active, a1.currency, a1.interest_rate, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id <> 120 UNION SELECT a2.is_active, a2.currency, a2.interest_rate, a2.customer_id FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.balance > 568 ORDER BY is_active LIMIT 50
SELECT c1.card_type, c1.is_active, c1.account_id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.is_active = 1 UNION ALL SELECT c2.card_type, c2.is_active, c2.account_id FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.credit_limit <= 571
SELECT e1.position, e1.salary FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id >= 415 UNION SELECT e2.position, e2.salary FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.branch_id >= 103

SELECT b1.city, b1.id, b1.employee_count, b1.state FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city <> 'test' UNION SELECT b2.city, b2.id, b2.employee_count, b2.state FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.employee_count >= 802 LIMIT 34

SELECT e1.is_active, e1.position, e1.last_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.id > 26 UNION ALL SELECT e2.is_active, e2.position, e2.last_name FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.salary > 144 ORDER BY is_active LIMIT 35

SELECT c1.email, c1.first_name FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.address <> 'activity' UNION SELECT c2.email, c2.first_name FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-27 days') ORDER BY email

SELECT a1.balance, a1.id, a1.customer_id, a1.account_type FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.is_active = 1 UNION SELECT a2.balance, a2.id, a2.customer_id, a2.account_type FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.account_type LIKE '%a%' LIMIT 40

SELECT b1.name, b1.id, b1.is_active, b1.manager_id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.employee_count <= 14 UNION ALL SELECT b2.name, b2.id, b2.is_active, b2.manager_id FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.manager_id <> 353
SELECT b1.id, b1.employee_count, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT b2.id, b2.employee_count, b2.city FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.is_active = 0 LIMIT 37
SELECT l1.end_date, l1.interest_rate, l1.status FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.term_months = 51 UNION SELECT l2.end_date, l2.interest_rate, l2.status FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.term_months <> 70

SELECT c1.phone, c1.credit_score FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-30 days') UNION SELECT c2.phone, c2.credit_score FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-17 days')
SELECT c1.account_id, c1.id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.card_type = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT c2.account_id, c2.id FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.expiry_date > DATETIME('now', '-23 days')
